paper_metadata.title: GPT-4 Technical Report
paper_metadata.abstract: We report the development of GPT-4, a large-scale, multimodal model which can accept image and text inputs and produce text outputs. While less capable than humans in many real-world scenarios, GPT-4 exhibits human-level performance on various professional and academic benchmarks, including passing a simulated bar exam with a score around the top 10% of test takers. GPT-4 is a Transformer-based model pre-trained to predict the next token in a document. The post-training alignment process results in improved performance on measures of factuality and adherence to desired behavior. A core component of this project was developing infrastructure and optimization methods that behave predictably across a wide range of scales. This allowed us to accurately predict some aspects of GPT-4's performance based on models trained with no more than 1/1,000th the compute of GPT-4.

extraction_data.innovation: Large-scale generative pre-training with enhanced capability on academic and professional exams, evaluated for contamination and impact of reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). The base model achieves strong performance on multiple-choice questions without substantial alteration post-RLHF.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Publicly available data (such as internet data) and data licensed from third-party providers
extraction_data.extension: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) for alignment without substantially altering base model capability.
extraction_data.research_problem: Large-scale multimodal language models, improving language understanding and generation, and safety alignment
extraction_data.application: Dialogue systems, text summarization, machine translation, coding assistance, exam simulation, general language tasks

extraction_data.innovation: A text-only variant of GPT-4, maintaining the same core architecture and training objectives but without vision capabilities. It achieves comparable performance to the full GPT-4 model on text-based benchmarks and exams.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale diverse text corpus (details not specified)
extraction_data.application: Natural language understanding, exam simulation, code generation, reasoning, chat, instruction following
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling language models to achieve human-level performance on complex tasks and benchmarks

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 Vision extends GPT-4's capabilities to accept interleaved text and image inputs, enabling vision-language tasks such as describing images, interpreting diagrams, and reasoning over visual content.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text and image corpus (details in Appendix E)
extraction_data.application: Image captioning, visual question answering, document understanding, diagram interpretation
extraction_data.extension: Integration of visual encoders to process image inputs alongside text, enabling multimodal reasoning and generation.

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 introduces a large-scale Transformer-based decoder model with improved reasoning, instruction following, and safety alignment via RLHF post-training. It demonstrates significant gains in accuracy and calibration over prior models like GPT-3.5, particularly after RLHF fine-tuning.
extraction_data.application: Chat, instruction following, question answering, code generation, adversarial testing, and general language tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Large-scale language modeling, safety alignment, and task generalization
extraction_data.extension: Rule-based reward models (RBRMs) as zero-shot GPT-4 classifiers for fine-grained safety alignment during RLHF fine-tuning.

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 (RLHF) extends the base model with improved safety, alignment, and refusal behavior via reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and rule-based reward models (RBRMs). It reduces harmful outputs and improves calibration on allowed vs disallowed prompts.
extraction_data.application: Chat, instruction following, question answering, code generation, adversarial testing, and general language tasks with improved safety
extraction_data.research_problem: Safety alignment, harmful content mitigation, and fine-grained behavior control in large language models
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) and model-assisted safety pipeline
extraction_data.extension: Rule-based reward models (RBRMs) for targeted behavior alignment during RLHF fine-tuning, enabling better refusal of harmful prompts and reduced over-caution on safe inputs.

extraction_data.innovation: The base model of GPT-4 is pre-trained on a diverse corpus to predict the next token, leveraging large-scale unsupervised learning to achieve broad language understanding and generation capabilities.
extraction_data.application: Pre-trained language model for downstream fine-tuning and adaptation
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models for improved language understanding and generation
extraction_data.extension: Scaled-up Transformer architecture with sparse attention mechanisms for efficiency

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 with vision capabilities extends the model to process and reason over image inputs alongside text, enabling multimodal applications such as visual question answering and image-based task completion.
extraction_data.application: Visual question answering, image-based task completion, multimodal chat, and instruction following
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with multimodal inputs

extraction_data.innovation: Snapshot of GPT-4 used for multiple-choice exam evaluations, demonstrating high performance on standardized tests without vision capabilities.
extraction_data.application: Multiple-choice exam solving, general language tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Language understanding and reasoning on standardized exams

extraction_data.innovation: Snapshot of GPT-4 used for free-response exam evaluations, optimized for generating detailed and sophisticated text responses.
extraction_data.application: Free-response exam solving, essay writing, general language tasks

extraction_data.innovation: Earlier snapshot of GPT-4 used for specific evaluations like the USABO semifinal exam, showing foundational capabilities in scientific reasoning.
extraction_data.application: Biology exam solving, scientific reasoning tasks

extraction_data.innovation: Baseline model for comparison, demonstrating strong performance on text-based tasks and serving as a precursor to GPT-4 with improved instruction-following capabilities.
extraction_data.application: Chat, instruction following, general language tasks, exam solving

extraction_data.innovation: Post-trained variant of GPT-4 using reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) to improve alignment and instruction-following capabilities while maintaining base model performance on academic and professional exams.
extraction_data.application: Chat, instruction following, exam benchmarking, free-response generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human preferences and instructions
extraction_data.extension: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) for improved instruction-following and alignment.

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 introduces advanced instruction-following capabilities and reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) to align model outputs with human preferences, improving safety and controllability compared to prior models like GPT-3.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text dataset with additional data
extraction_data.application: Question answering, arithmetic, classification, chat, instruction following, general language tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Large-scale language model safety, alignment, and task generalization
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Instruction fine-tuning, Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
extraction_data.extension: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) for alignment and safety mitigations

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4-launch extends GPT-4-early with enhanced safety mitigations, including refusal training for illicit advice, reduced hallucinations, and adversarial prompt resistance, making it significantly safer and more aligned with human values.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text dataset with additional data
extraction_data.application: Question answering, arithmetic, classification, chat, instruction following, general language tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Large-scale language model safety, alignment, and task generalization
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Instruction fine-tuning, Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) for increased helpfulness and harmlessness
extraction_data.extension: Enhanced safety mitigations including refusal training, hallucination reduction, and adversarial prompt resistance

extraction_data.innovation: Large-scale language model with improved safety and alignment mechanisms to reduce harmful outputs, compared to earlier versions. Introduces refusal training to mitigate biased or harmful content generation.
extraction_data.application: General language tasks, chat, instruction following, knowledge discovery, and learning
extraction_data.research_problem: Safe and aligned large language models for general-purpose use

extraction_data.innovation: Improved version of GPT-4 with enhanced refusal mechanisms and bias mitigation strategies to address harmful, biased, or stereotyping outputs, while maintaining performance on general language tasks.
extraction_data.application: General language tasks, chat, instruction following, knowledge discovery, and learning
extraction_data.research_problem: Safe and aligned large language models for general-purpose use
extraction_data.extension: Adversarial system messages and jailbreak mitigations to improve robustness against exploits.

extraction_data.innovation: GPT-4 (vision variant) extends the model's capabilities to multimodal inputs, enabling it to process and reason over both text and images for tasks requiring visual context.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text and image corpus (details not specified)
extraction_data.application: Image captioning, visual question answering, multimodal reasoning, safety-critical applications with visual inputs
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with vision input
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), Constitutional AI
extraction_data.extension: Multimodal input processing for vision-language tasks, enabling image understanding alongside text generation.
